name: OpenClaw Data China Stock
description: A-share / ETF / option market data for OpenClaw: unified tool_fetch_market_data, P0/P1 A-share domain tools (universe, financial statements, corporate actions, margin, block trades; shareholders, IPO, index constituents, news/research), stock views (timeshare, pre_market, market_overview, valuation_snapshot), multi-source fallback and optional provider_preference.

apiBaseUrl.description: 可选外部服务 API 基础地址（仅部分兼容接口可能需要）

scriptPath.description: tool_runner.py 绝对路径（可选；不填则使用插件内的默认路径）

manifestPath.description: 工具清单 JSON 路径（可选），不填则使用插件内 config/tools_manifest.json
